personal.name: Saib Hossain
personal.title: AI Researcher | Agentic Systems & Medical Imaging
personal.bio: Developing Agentic AI systems for lung cancer screening and survival analysis using deep learning on CT imaging. Passionate about integrating clinical data with computer vision, generative modeling, and AI safety for impactful healthcare solutions.

research_focus.title: Radiomic Features & Lung Tumor Correlation Analysis
research_focus.description: Developing deep learning pipelines for medical image analysis to correlate radiomic features with tumor stage, therapeutic success, and survival outcomes. Focus on model reliability, data bias mitigation, and clinical AI governance.

research_focus.title: Generative AI for Synthetic Medical Data
research_focus.description: Building hybrid GAN + Diffusion pipelines (StyleGAN2-ADA, SDXL+LoRA) to generate high-quality synthetic face/medical data for vision research, addressing data scarcity while preserving identity control and diversity.

research_focus.title: AI Safety & Alignment Research
research_focus.description: Contributing to theoretical foundations of safe AI systems through literature reviews, research briefs, and synthesis of technical papers on model capabilities and alignment strategies.

projects.title: Agentic AI Technical Interviewer
projects.description: Stateful, non-linear AI interviewing agent that parses CVs, generates customized technical agendas, and conducts dynamic conversational interviews with intent routing and structured evaluation.
highlights: Robust state machine for complex conversation loops

projects.title: MedAssist-LLM-iPhone (Offline Medical QA)
projects.description: Fine-tuned Qwen2.5-0.5B-Instruct on medical QA dataset with LoRA, optimized for fully offline inference on iPhone via GGUF quantization and llama.cpp.
highlights: On-device LLM inference without cloud dependency
Optimized memory usage for mobile deployment

projects.title: Real-Time Vision + LLM Agent (LLM with Eyes)
projects.description: Autonomous vision agent integrating YOLO11 object detection with Gemini 2.5 Flash for contextual reasoning about visual environments in real-time.

projects.title: Synthetic Face Dataset Generation (GANs + Diffusion)
projects.description: Hybrid generative pipeline combining StyleGAN2-ADA and SDXL+LoRA to study dataset effects on synthetic face generation for controlled vision experiments.
highlights: Adaptive Discriminator Augmentation for small datasets
Quality evaluation framework for generative consistency

projects.title: LangGraph MCP Agent + XAMPP MySQL Integration
projects.description: Modular LangGraph-powered MCP server with FastAPI backend and MySQL integration for intelligent document management and AI-driven query workflows.
highlights: File upload pipeline with metadata indexing

projects.title: Bangla Sign Language Translator
projects.description: Vision-based Bangla sign language recognition system translating hand gestures into Bangla alphabets and spoken words using MediaPipe + CNN.
highlights: Real-time gesture detection with hand landmarks
ESP32/Raspberry Pi deployment for assistive tech

projects.title: Googler Search Agent
projects.description: Autonomous AI search agent retrieving web results and generating concise summaries using local LLMs via Ollama + LangGraph orchestration.

projects.title: Prompt-Based Dynamic LLM Selector
projects.description: Intelligent routing system selecting optimal locally-hosted LLM (Gemma3, DeepSeek-R1) based on prompt complexity to balance accuracy and compute cost.
highlights: Dynamic model selection based on prompt analysis

projects.title: DeepLearning-with-PyTorch
projects.description: Foundational deep learning implementations for image classification using CNNs on MNIST/FashionMNIST with optimization experiments.

projects.title: AI-Based Plagiarism Detection
projects.description: Privacy-preserving system detecting AI-generated text using on-device LLMs and NLP classification techniques without cloud dependency.

projects.title: AI-Powered Study Assistant Chatbot
projects.description: Educational chatbot using fine-tuned GPT-2 for student Q&A support with FastAPI backend and interactive web interface.
highlights: REST API backend with conversational AI
Interactive web interface for learning support

certifications.title: IBM AI Engineering Professional Certificate
certifications.description: Hands-on experience in machine learning, deep learning with PyTorch/TensorFlow, and building deployable AI applications.

certifications.title: Google Data Analytics Professional Certificate
certifications.description: Foundation in data analysis using spreadsheets, SQL, R, and visualization tools like Tableau.

certifications.title: Transformer Models and BERT
certifications.description: Practical knowledge of transformer architecture, attention mechanisms, and fine-tuning BERT for NLP tasks with Hugging Face.

certifications.title: IBM Data Science Fundamentals
certifications.description: Basics of data science workflow, Python programming, and data analysis using Jupyter, Pandas, and NumPy.

certifications.title: Financial Markets – Yale University
certifications.description: Foundational understanding of financial markets, investment strategies, risk management, and behavioral finance.

achievements.title: Lead the Future 2025 @ INVENTIOUS 4.1
achievements.description: Recognition for innovative AI project leadership and technical execution.

achievements.title: UIU Book Reading Competition 2025
achievements.description: Awarded for academic engagement and knowledge synthesis.

extracurriculars.description: Developed autonomous navigation systems for Mars rover prototypes using ROS, sensor fusion, and SLAM.
highlights: Implemented LiDAR/IMU/camera sensor fusion for robust localization
Built simulation pipelines in Gazebo/Rviz with PID control
Applied OpenCV for visual odometry and obstacle detection

extracurriculars.description: Led child rights advocacy initiatives in partnership with Save the Children and Plan International.
highlights: Organized community awareness campaigns on child protection
Coordinated with national NGOs for program implementation
Developed leadership and stakeholder management skills
